Document:
# Nuclear 14
Welcome to the early testing of Nuclear 14. This is a SS14 fork based on the Fallout universe, using hybrid lore with some canonical, non-canonical (Fallout Tactics), and original lore elements to create a rich and engaging gameplay experience.
## Roleplay This game is primarily a medium-roleplay game, which means we have higher roleplay standards than a casual game, but it is not so serious that we cannot all have fun. Remember to read the rules and stay in character when possible.
There is no main character here; we are all just characters in a large multiplayer story. Keep that in mind before ruining someone else's story.
## Getting Started It is recommended to start with the [color=#a4885c]controls[/color] guide, then read the [color=#a4885c]character creation[/color], [color=#a4885c]roleplay[/color], and [color=#a4885c]factions[/color] guides. Not every profession or concept has a guide yet, and we strongly encourage you to help write them if you are an experienced player!
